task_description: Build a comprehensive Admin Panel (apps/admin) for the Quant-Ecosystem monorepo as a Next.js 15 app with dashboard, apps management, users, services monitor, AI/ML dashboard, security center, database overview, and settings pages. Then fix all remaining wiring/build issues across the monorepo.

verification.summary: All turbo pipelines pass: typecheck 129/129, build 105/105, test 133/133, lint 112/112. Zero failures across the entire monorepo including the new admin app.
